zh.lifeSummary: Rissa Montgomery於1044年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉格曼-德-素次。她於大約1064年與Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire在英國格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1090年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rissa Montgomery于1044年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利沙吉格曼-德-素次。她于大约1064年与Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire在英国格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1090年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Rissa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Melissa .   See also  Lyssa .

en.lifeSummary: Rissa Montgomery was born in 1044, in Saint-Germain-des-Essourts, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France. She married Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire about 1064, in Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1090, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Rissa Montgomery est née en 1044, à Saint-Germain-des-Essourts, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France. Elle a épousé Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire environ 1064, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1090, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Rissa Montgomery wurde 1044 in Saint-Germain-des-Essourts, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat um 1064 in Gloucestershire, England Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1090 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Rissa Montgomery è nata il nel 1044 nel Saint-Germain-des-Essourts, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia. Lei sposato Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire circa 1064, nel Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1090, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rissa Montgomeryは1044年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメサイント-ジャーメイン-デス-エソウルツで生まれた。約1064年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでRoger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1090年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rissa Montgomery(은)는 1044년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 세인트-그맹-데스-소우르츠에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1064년 영국 그루스스터실르에서 Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1090년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Rissa Montgomery nasceu em 1044, em Saint-Germain-des-Essourts, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França. Ela casou-se com Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire aproximadamente 1064, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1090, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Rissa Montgomery родилась в 1044 г. в местности сеинт-гирмеин-дес-ессоурц, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire около 1064 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1090 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Rissa Montgomery nació en 1044, en Saint-Germain-des-Essourts, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia. Se casó con Roger I De Berkeley Lord of Gloucestershire aproximadamente 1064, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1090, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años.
